steps.t: Wadu's father Suvulch can be found somewhere within the Uch-lûth village of Lhanuch. You need to find the father of Wadu and bring him the sad news of…
Wadu's sister Nona can be found somewhere within Lhanuch, the village of the Uch-lûth, in Nan Laeglin. Suvulch has coldly dismissed the death of his s…
